choose.when:
<set-variable name="requestBody" value="@{
                try {
                    return context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                } catch {
                    return "";
                }
            }" />
            
            
                
                
                    
                    
                    <set-variable name="filterResult" value="@{
                        var primitiveType = (string)context.Variables["primitiveType"];
                        var primitiveName = (string)context.Variables["primitiveName"];
                        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(primitiveName)) return "allow";

                        // Read the per-server filter config from named value
                        string configKey = "mcp-primitives-" + context.Api.Id.Replace("-api", "");
                        string configJson = "";
                        try {
                            configJson = context.Variables.ContainsKey(configKey)
                                ? (string)context.Variables[configKey]
                                : "";
                        } catch {
                            return "allow";
                        }

                        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(configJson)) return "allow";

                        try {
                            var config = Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject.Parse(configJson);
                            var filter = config[primitiveType];
                            if (filter == null) return "allow";

                            var policy = filter["policy"]?.ToString() ?? "allowAll";

                            if (policy == "denyAll") return "deny";
                            if (policy == "allowAll") return "allow";

                            if (policy == "denyList") {
                                var denied = filter["denied"]?.ToObject() ?? new string[0];
                                foreach (var d in denied) {
                                    if (d.EndsWith("*")) {
                                        if (primitiveName.StartsWith(d.TrimEnd('*'))) return "deny";
                                    } else {
                                        if (primitiveName == d) return "deny";
                                    }
                                }
                                return "allow";
                            }

                            if (policy == "allowList") {
                                var allowed = filter["allowed"]?.ToObject() ?? new string[0];
                                foreach (var a in allowed) {
                                    if (a.EndsWith("*")) {
                                        if (primitiveName.StartsWith(a.TrimEnd('*'))) return "allow";
                                    } else {
                                        if (primitiveName == a) return "allow";
                                    }
                                }
                                return "deny";
                            }

                            return "allow";
                        } catch {
                            return "allow";
                        }
                    }" />
                    
                        
                            
                                
                                
                                    application/json
                                
                                @{
                                    var body = (string)context.Variables["requestBody"];
                                    var id = "null";
                                    try {
                                        var json = Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject.Parse(body);
                                        id = json["id"]?.ToString() ?? "null";
                                    } catch {}
                                    var primitiveType = (string)context.Variables["primitiveType"];
                                    var primitiveName = (string)context.Variables["primitiveName"];
                                    return "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":" + id + ",\"error\":{\"code\":-32600,\"message\":\"Blocked by governance policy: " + primitiveType + "/" + primitiveName + " is not allowed on this gateway.\"}}";
                                }
